title: pleiosorbus wardii
intro: Pleiosorbus wardii, also known as the Chinese rowan or Ward's rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds and flu.
